rule_hits.summary: Lists the references cited throughout the paper, detailing studies and works related to hallucination in various types of foundation models.
Discusses methods for detecting and mitigating hallucinations in large language models (LLMs), including SELFCHECKGPT, PURR, and HaluEval. Also mentions datasets and benchmarks...
Explores hallucinations in large vision language models (LVLMs) and introduces methods like the Hallucinator and POPE for mitigating object hallucinations in image descriptions.
Discusses the potential benefits of hallucinations in creative contexts and summarizes various works related to hallucination detection and mitigation across different modalities.
